steps.title: Build the researcher phrase
steps.content: Mark A. Lee identifies which researcher led the 2014 study, so the name is restrictive and should not be set off with commas. The initial A. also needs its period.

steps.title: Remove comma and initial errors
steps.content:
• Choice A has an unnecessary comma after researcher and omits the period after the middle initial.
  • Choice B adds a comma after Lee, incorrectly separating the subject phrase from studied.
  • Choice D adds an unnecessary comma after researcher before the identifying name.
The answer is C.
